title: What it means when a feature request is "Under consideration"
excerpt: If a feature is marked as “under consideration” it means that while we understand the need for this feature, at the moment, this feature is not planned in our upcoming roadmap due to other priorities and team capacity. W…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
If a feature is marked as “under consideration” it means that while we understand the need for this feature, at the moment, this feature is not planned in our upcoming roadmap due to other priorities and team capacity. We are looking into this feature and are considering adding it to our roadmaps in the future. When thinking about the upcoming roadmap, our team needs to make difficult decisions about how we prioritize new features, improve old ones, and ensure overall platform quality.

Please be aware that our roadmap is subject to change due to evolving capabilities and priorities and if there are any changes to our roadmap we will keep you in the loop.

Every quarter we take the feature request with the most votes and discuss them with our Product team. To learn more about the feature request process, how it works, and how to become part of the magic read here.
